name: raccoon-data-analysis
tagline: ClawHub (71★): 当用户需要使用小浣熊(Raccoon)进行数据分析会话管理、文件上传下载、数据可视化、数据分析交互时使用此技能。触发词包括"小浣熊数据分析"、"Raccoon数据分析"、"数据分析会话"。
verdict: Functionally sound and safe, but hygiene is a mess: the frontmatter name (raccoon-dataanalysis) doesn't even match its own directory, which can break lookup or dispatch. It also has no scope-exclusion language and no version tracking at all.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language appears anywhere in the description or body; the skill never points to when a different skill or a local-analysis approach would be
The skill's directory is raccoon-data-analysis (hyphenated between data and analysis) but the frontmatter name is raccoon-dataanalysis — the two do not match.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes appear anywhere in the file.
